gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/335)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/335)
text: قَالَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( صلوات الله عليه ) كُلُّ امْرِئٍ تُدَبِّرُهُ امْرَأَةٌ فَهُوَ مَلْعُونٌ .

en.hubeali: ‘He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Every man who is managed by a woman, so he is an accursed’.
en.sarwar: 10. Through the same chain of narrators as that of the previous Hadith the following is narrated: “’Amir al-Mu’minin ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘A man who follows (unlawful) policies of woman is condemned.’”
